apps.name: LevelUp
apps.tagline: Level up your life across nine categories
apps.description: A gamified personal-development tracker. Earn XP and level up across nine life categories, log activities and daily habits, schedule events, and track vices with streaks. Works fully offline.

apps.name: Calorie Counter
apps.tagline: Scan barcodes to track calories, macros & micros
apps.description: A personal calorie, macro and micronutrient tracker built to fuel training (BJJ, Muay Thai, S&C). Search or scan foods across USDA, Open Food Facts, Edamam, Nutritionix and FatSecret; log against custom daily targets with a higher-carb Sunday refeed; and see your vitamins & minerals vs %DV. Snap a photo of an API key instead of typing it. Works offline; data stays on your phone.

apps.name: Pulse
apps.tagline: Whoop-style recovery, strain & sleep from your Pixel Watch
apps.description: A personal, Whoop-style health tracker for your Google Pixel Watch. Reads your HRV, resting heart rate, sleep stages and heart-rate zones from Health Connect to produce daily Recovery, Strain and Sleep scores, plus trends. Every score carries a confidence rating that tells you how much to trust it and why. Everything stays on your phone — no account, no cloud.
